messages.body: Morning! Are we still on for the project kickoff today?
Yes! I'll send the agenda over in an hour.
Got it, looks great. Can you also book the conference room for Friday?
Will do, I'll handle the booking.
The client loved the demo!! Huge win for us.
Amazing news, so relieved. Great teamwork.
Heads up, the budget got cut and we need to rescope by next week.
Ugh, frustrating. I'll draft a reduced scope and we can review Monday.
Don't forget your dentist appointment on the 25th!
Thanks for the reminder, I'll be there.
Call me when you can, nothing urgent, just miss you.
